fastapi>=0.111.0
uvicorn>=0.29.0
aiocoap>=0.4.7
# Wire protocol: the protobuf *runtime* only, to load the committed
# server/tracker_pb2.py (schema: proto/tracker.proto). Kept <6 to match the
# version nanopb's toolchain pins -- a stub generated by a newer protoc embeds a
# runtime-version check and refuses to load on an older runtime, so both ends
# must agree.
#
# protoc itself is NOT here: it is only needed to *regenerate* the stubs
# (`make proto`), which is a dev-workspace task -- grpcio-tools comes in via
# nanopb's west module. A server-only host (the VM) runs `make setup-host` and
# needs none of it.
protobuf>=5.27,<6
